meta.title: AI Model Change Radar
meta.tagline: Every major LLM provider's deprecation, shutdown, and breaking-change events — one normalized timeline.
meta.review_note: Each event verified against the provider's own deprecation page or official announcement on the last_reviewed date. Dates are the provider's stated dates; 'earliest possible' shutdowns are flagged.

events.title: GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini & o4-mini removed from ChatGPT
events.impact: Model picker entries disappear; saved chats on these models silently switch to GPT-5.2. ~2 weeks notice.

events.title: API snapshot chatgpt-4o-latest removed from the API
events.replacement: A dated GPT-4o snapshot or a GPT-5.x model
events.impact: Apps pinned to the floating chatgpt-4o-latest alias start erroring; must pin a dated snapshot or migrate.

events.title: Assistants API (beta) sunset
events.replacement: Responses API + Conversations API (no automated Threads→Conversations migration tool)
events.impact: Entire Assistants/Threads/Runs surface stops working. Manual backfill of conversation history required.

events.title: 8 legacy Grok API models retired
events.effective_note: Retires 2026-05-15 at 12:00 PM PT. Old slugs auto-redirect to grok-4.3 but are billed at grok-4.3 pricing ($1.25/$2.50 per 1M).
events.impact: Hard-coded Grok model IDs silently reroute to grok-4.3 with different behavior and pricing. Only 9 days notice.

events.title: Gemini 2.0 Flash & 2.0 Flash-Lite shutdown
events.effective_note: June 1 is the EARLIEST possible shutdown; Google will give advance notice of the exact date. Already restricted to existing customers since 2026-03-06.
events.replacement: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite (~33% price increase; updated knowledge cutoff & 8x output limit)
events.impact: gemini-2.0-flash / -lite calls fail; replacement costs ~33% more. New customers already cut off.

events.title: Claude Opus 3 retired
events.effective_note: Kept available on claude.ai for paid users and by request on the API post-retirement (unusual — most retirements hard-fail).
events.impact: Standard API requests to claude-3-opus-20240229 fail; access only by special request afterward.

events.title: Claude Haiku 3 retired
events.effective_note: Anthropic policy: at least 60 days notice for publicly released models.
events.replacement: Claude Haiku 4.5 (model ID + parameter changes required, not a pure drop-in)
events.impact: All API requests to claude-3-haiku-20240307 return an error after 2026-04-19.

events.title: Claude Opus 4 & Sonnet 4 retired
events.effective_note: Anthropic policy: at least 60 days notice for publicly released models.
events.replacement: claude-opus-4-6 / claude-sonnet-4-6 (one-line ID swap, but re-test streaming, structured output, long-context)
events.impact: Requests to the Opus 4 / Sonnet 4 model IDs fail after 2026-06-15.
